title: SHSRC Tamil Nadu Jobs 2026 - Apply Online for 12 Intern Posts
description: The State Health Systems Resource Centre, Tamil Nadu (SHSRC Tamil Nadu) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 12 Intern Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Post-graduation, and Diploma can apply for the SHSRC Tamil Nadu Jobs 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit...
